verses.text: Hih thute khempeuh leh citaka hih banga na a kisep khit ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib hong pai-in Judah simin kulhnei khuapite' langkhatah phual sat a, ama-a' dingin lak a sawm hi
Sennakherib hong pai-in Jerusalem sim ding a sawmna thu Hezekiah in a theih ciangin
amah in a uliante leh a mi thahatte tawh khuapi pualamah a luangkhia tuinakte khakcip ding vaihawm a, amaute in amah a huh uh hi
Mi tampi tak kikhawm uh a, gamsungah a luang tuinak leh lui khempeuh khakcipin, “Bang hangin Assiria kumpite hong pai-in tui tampi mu ding ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi

Amah in lungsim khotakin sep ding kipan a, a cimsa kulh khempeuh ciangpha-in tua tungah tausangte koihto a, tua pualamah kulh dang khat a ciang hi. Amah in David khuapi sungah Millo a muan'huai-in a bawlpha hi. Amah in galhiamte leh lumte zong tampi bawl hi
Amah in mite a uk dingin galdona-ah a ukte koih a, khuapi kulhkongpi mun awngna ama kiangah amaute khawmin amaute tungah hanthotna tawh thu genin
“Thakhauh un la hang un. Assiria kumpipa leh amah tawh a om mihon khempeuh mai-ah lau kei un la, zong lungkia kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh a omte sangin eite tawh a ompa lianzaw hi

Amah in mihing thahatna nei a, ahih hangin eite hong huhin i gal hong dosak dingin Topa i Pasian in eite hong ompih hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in Judah kumpipa Hezekiah' kammalte a muang uh hi
Hih thute khit ciangin a galkap khempeuh tawh Lakhish a umcih, Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib in Judah kumpipa Hezekiah leh Jerusalem-ah a om Judah mi khempeuh kiang Jerusalem-ah a nasemte sawlin
“Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Note in Jerusalem umcihna na nan'na ding uh bang suang na hi uh hiam

Hezekiah in note kiangah, “Assiria kumpipa' khut panin Topa i Pasian in eite hong honkhia ding hi,” hong cih ciangin, note gilkial dangtakin a hong sisak dingin amah in note hong makai khial hilo ahi hiam

Hih Hezekiah mah in mual dawna a biakpiaknate leh ama biakna taute lakhia-in Judah leh Jerusalem thu pia a, “Biakna tau khat mai-ah note in bia-in tua tungah na biakpiaknate uh na hal ding uh hi,” ci hilo ahi hiam
Keimah leh ka pu ka pate in gamdang mi khempeuh tungah ka hihnasate uh theilo na hi uh hiam? Tua gam minamte' pasian in keima khutsung panin a gam uh honkhiazo ahi uh hiam
Na Pasian un keima khutsung panin note hong hotkhiat theihna dingin ka pu ka pate in a suksiatmang tua minamte' pasian khempeuh lakah kua in a mite honkhiazo ngei ahi hiam

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note, Hezekiah' khemsa-in ta kei un la, hih bangin kimakai khialsak kei un. Amah um kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh minam khatpeuh, kumpi gam khatpeuh' pasian in keima khut pan ahi a, ka pu ka pate' khutsung pan ahi zongin a mite honkhiazo ngei nailo hi. Keima khutsung pan na Pasian un note hong honkhia zolo zaw kan ding hi,’ ci un,” a cisak hi
Tua ciangin ama nasemte in Topa Pasian leh a nasempa Hezekiah langpangin thu tamzaw gen lai uh hi

Tua ciangin amah in Israel Pasian, Topa' hehna ding leh amah a langpan'na-in laikhakte gelh a, “Ka khutsung panin a mite a honkhia zolo gamsung minam dangte' pasian-te mah bangin ka khutsung panin Hezekiah' Pasian in a mite honkhia zolo ding hi,” ci hi
Amaute in khuapi a laktheihna dingin khuapi mite lau-in a linglawn'sakna dingun kulh tungah a om Jerusalem mite tungah Judah pau tawh nakpi takin kiko uh hi
Amaute in, mite' khut tawh a kibawl leitung mite' pasian-te a gen bang lelun Jerusalem Pasian a gen uh hi.
Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah leh Amoz' tapa, kamsang Isaiah in hih thu hangin thu ngenin vantung lamah kiko uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa' giahphualah a thahat galhang khempeuh leh galkap a ukte leh uliante a susia vantung mi khat a sawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama gamah maizumna tawh a ciahkik hi. Ama pasian' inn sungah amah a tun' ciangin ama tapate pawlkhat in namsau tawh amah satlum uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib' khut leh ama galte khempeuh panin Hezekiah leh Jerusalem-a a tengte honkhia a, amah in mun khempeuh panin galdaihna amaute tungah a pia hi
Tua ciangin mi tampi in Jerusalem khua Topa kiangah letsongte hong puakin, Judah kumpi Hezekiah kiangah na manphate hong puak uh a, tua huna kipanin minam khempeuh' muhna-ah amah kisangtawi hi.
Tua hun lai-in Hezekiah cina-in si dektak a, amah in Topa' tungah thu ngen hi. Topa in a ngetna pia-in ama tungah lim khat a pia hi

Ahih hangin a lungsim kiphasak ahih manin ama tungah phattuamna a kibawl zahin Topa' tungah Hezekiah in lungdam ko nuamlo hi. Tua ahih manin amah leh Judah leh Jerusalem tungah Topa' hehna hong tung hi
Ahi zongin a nung ciangin Hezekiah a lungsim kiphatsakna thu-ah amah leh Jerusalem-a teng mite tawh kiniamkhiat uh ahih manin amaute' tungah Topa' hehna hong tunglo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Hezekiah in Babylon pana Kamtaite Saang

verses.text: Hezekiah hau mahmahin a min thang mahmah hi. Amah in ngun, kham, suangmanphate, a namtui nate, lumte, a manpha umlebeel khempeuh-a' dingin vanmanpha koihnate a bawl hi
An, leenggahzu, leh sathau koihna ding vankoihnate zong a bawl hi. Ganhing nam khempeuh-a' dingin ganbukte, leh tuubukte a bawl hi
Amah in tua bangmahin amahmah-a' dingin khuapite leh tuuhonte leh ganhonte tampi a koih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama tungah neihsa tampi tak pia hi
Hih Hezekiah mah in Gihon tui tungnungte khaktanin David khuapi nitumna lampangah luangsak hi. Hezekiah a nasepna khempeuhah a ma vang hi

Tua ahih ciangin gamsung omzia lim a kan dingin ama kiangah a kisawl Babylon uliante' kamtaite tawh kisai-in, amah a ze-etna ding leh ama lungsim sungah bang om hiam cih a vekpi-in a theihna dingin Pasian in ama thu-in amah a omsak hi.
Tu-in Hezekiah' gamtatna a omlaite, leh ama nasep hoihte, Judah leh Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sung, leh Amoz' Tapa, Kamsang Isaiah' Maangmuhna sungah kigelh hi

Tua ciangin Hezekiah si a, amaute in David' suante' han paina mualpangah amah vui uh hi. Judah mi khempeuh leh Jerusalem-a tengte in a sih lai-in amah zahtakna bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tapa Manasseh in ama tangin a uk hi.
